## Testing

- [ ] Ran `pytest` locally — all tests pass
- [ ] Ran `ruff check src/ tests/` — no lint errors

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style (pathlib, specific exception types, argparse)
- [ ] New tool registered in `setup.py` entry points (if adding a CLI command)
- [ ] New tool added to `README.md` features list (if user-facing)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, paths, or secrets
